stories.headline: Meloni urges EU to treat energy crisis like defence emergency, relax fiscal rules
stories.summary: Meloni calls for greater budget flexibility to tackle rising energy costs, warning Italy could exit the SAFE defence programme, in a new letter sent to the European Commission.

stories.headline: 'The Clock is Ticking' - Trump's Latest Iran Threat Pushes Oil Prices Higher
stories.summary: US President Donald Trump expressed frustration with Iran and told it the "clock is ticking," hours after drones targeted a nuclear power plant in the United Arab Emirates. The fresh threats helped push up oil prices further on Monday. Earlier on Sunday, a drone sparked a fire in a power station at the United Arab Emirates' Barakah nuclear plant, underscoring the fragility of the truce. stories.headline: Magyar signals first openness to Ukraine accession talks since Orbán’s departure
stories.summary: Hungary's new government says it is open to engaging with Ukraine on its accession to the EU, according to several sources. Meanwhile, a technical dialogue with Kyiv has been announced on the thorny issue of Hungarian minorities. Brussels looks for a breakthrough.

stories.headline: Zelenskyy's former chief of staff released on €2.7 million bail in anti-corruption probe
stories.summary: According to Ukraine's anti-corruption investigators, Andriy Yermak is a suspect in a large money laundering probe tied to the construction of a luxury residence complex outside Kyiv.

stories.headline: Iran says nuclear enrichment rights cannot be ‘negotiated’
stories.summary: Iran’s nuclear enrichment is a right that ‘already exists’, foreign ministry spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei said.

stories.summary: The US Treasury Secretary says he’s calling ‘the world’ to join the US in imposing sanctions on Iran.

stories.headline: Ryanair profits surge 40% to €2.26 billion despite Boeing delays and fuel crisis
stories.summary: Europe’s largest low-cost airline posted record annual profits as rising fares and sustained travel demand helped offset aircraft delivery delays and mounting uncertainty in global fuel markets due to the Iran war.

stories.headline: 'Everest Man' and 'Mountain Queen' break own records scaling world's tallest peak
stories.summary: Kami Rita Sherpa and Lakpa Sherpa summited Everest for the 32nd and 11th time, respectively.

stories.headline: Chile Mortgage Rates Hit Four-Year Low, Easing Industry Crisis
stories.summary: Government subsidies have pushed Chile’s average mortgage rate below 4% for the first time in more than four years, boosting sales of cheaper homes, while failing to trigger a broader revival in the construction industry.

stories.headline: Stocks, Bonds Decline as Brent Hits $110 | Bloomberg Brief 5/18/2026

stories.headline: US Faces Challenging Summer Gas Season, BofA’s Blanch Says

stories.headline: NextEra to Buy Dominion for $67 Billion to Form Power Giant
stories.summary: NextEra Energy Inc. agreed to pay about $67 billion in stock for Dominion Energy Inc. in the biggest power acquisition ever, creating a giant utility extending from Florida to the data centers clustered in Virginia.

stories.headline: Burnham Gives Investors Mixed Message Ahead of UK Leadership Race

stories.headline: South Carolina Republicans to Debate New House Maps Despite Qualms

stories.headline: Rescue diver dies during search for bodies of Italians who drowned in Maldives caves
stories.summary: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.
